title: pilosella niphostribes subsp. glaucophylla
intro: Pilosella niphostribes subsp. glaucophylla, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing fever, promoting wound healing, and supporting liver function. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Pilosella niphostribes subsp. glaucophylla for medicinal purposes, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
